title: paspalum oteroi
intro: Paspalum oteroi, also known as the Otero grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum oteroi include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Paspalum oteroi typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
